description: The system uses real-time weather data to calculate the actual, dynamic thermal rating of a transmission line, allowing more power to flow than its static rating would suggest.

nodes.task_description: Gather real-time weather data along the transmission line corridor (e.g., wind speed, ambient temperature).

expected_outcome.value: System retrieves live weather data from field sensors.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the real-time thermal rating of the line based on the cooling effect of the wind.

expected_outcome.value: System calculates that the line can safely carry 15% more power than its static rating.

nodes.task_description: Update the line's operating limit in the energy management system (EMS), allowing for more efficient grid dispatch.

expected_outcome.value: System updates the operational limit in the EMS.
